data.title: Sei Network enhances rewards program with recent Orbs integration and Bhutan validator partnership, SEI trades at $0.1055.
data.description: The Sei Network has outlined its rewards framework within its ecosystem as the cryptocurrency SEI is currently trading at $0.1055. The network's credibility has received a significant boost by its recent integration with Orbs and partnership with a validator from Bhutan.

data.title: Trump admin abandons minimum price support for US critical minerals projects due to funding issues. No response from White House yet. MP Materials price floor set last July remains unchanged. Policy shift affects future deals.
data.description: The Trump administration has reportedly decided to backtrack on plans to ensure a minimum price for U.S. critical minerals projects due to potential lack of congressional funding and market pricing complexities. In a closed-door meeting with U.S. minerals executives in Washington, officials emphasized that projects should be financially sustainable without government price support. This policy change will impact future agreements but does not affect the established price floor for MP Materials (NYSE: MP) set in July. This decision contradicts previous assurances from officials, indicating the price floor for MP Materials was not a temporary measure. The White House has yet to respond to Benzinga's request for comment. For more details, please refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: S&P 500 and Dow Jones futures rise after Fed pause rate cuts. Fed maintains rates at 3.5%–3.75%. Microsoft drops 5.77%, Tesla up 2.71%. FedWatch predicts 86.5% chance of no rate change in March. Dow Jones +0.15%, S&P 500 +0.27%, Nasdaq 100 +0.37%, Russell 2000 +0.26%. SPY up 0.30%, QQQ up 0.36%. Microsoft RPO at $625B. Tesla invests $2B.
data.description: U.S. stock futures rose on Thursday after the Federal Reserve maintained the federal funds rate at 3.5%–3.75%. Fed Chair Jerome Powell emphasized data-driven decision-making and ignored political criticism. The 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.26%, and the two-year bond was at 3.58%. Markets predict an 86.5% chance of no interest rate changes in March. Major index futures were up: Dow Jones by 0.15%, S&P 500 by 0.27%, Nasdaq 100 by 0.37%, and Russell 2000 by 0.26%. SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF were higher in premarket trading. Microsoft's stock fell 5.77% despite positive second-quarter results, with remaining performance obligations at $625 billion. Tesla's stock rose by 2.71% post-better-than-expected fourth-quarter results and $2 billion investment plans.

data.title: Group 1 Automotive (NYSE: GPI) Q4 earnings missed estimates by -9.0%, reporting EPS of $8.49 (vs $9.37). Revenue up $34M.
data.description: Group 1 Automotive (NYSE: GPI) released its Q4 earnings report on January 29, 2026, at 05:01 AM. The company fell short of projected earnings by -9.0%, posting an EPS of $8.49 compared to the estimated $9.37. Revenue saw an increase of $34.00 million compared to the previous year. For more details on their performance in the last quarter, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Hexnode, enterprise software division of Mitsogo, releases Hexnode XDR for endpoint security. Jan 29, 2026. Making security accessible.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, in San Francisco, Hexnode, the enterprise software division of Mitsogo, launched Hexnode XDR, an extended detection and response platform. This platform aims to provide enterprise-level security to all IT teams. Hexnode XDR sets the groundwork for enhanced security measures within organizations.

data.title: Coinbase's CEO Armstrong supports Trump's initiative, will match $1,000 contributions for employees' kids in Bitcoin.
data.description: Brian Armstrong, the CEO of Coinbase Global Inc. (NASDAQ: COIN), announced that the company has enrolled in the Trump Accounts program, committing to matching the $1,000 donation for eligible children of Coinbase employees. Through a post, Armstrong commended the government initiative, stressing the significance of early investments in financial security and literacy for children. He stated, “We are pleased to support POTUS's initiative by matching the $1,000 provided by the U.S. Treasury for every eligible child of Coinbase staff.” Armstrong expressed interest in making the contribution in Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), highlighting the importance of starting investments early. Joining @TrumpAccounts is a positive step towards enhancing financial security and literacy for children. We are honored to participate in @POTUS's initiative by matching the $1,000 from the U.S. Treasury for all eligible children. For more information, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: CN Energy Group Inc. signed a framework agreement on Jan 25, 2026, for the potential acquisition of Blessing Logistics Ltd. in Lishui, China. (Character count: 142)
data.description: In LISHUI, China, a news release on January 29, 2026, revealed that CN Energy Group Inc. (NASDAQ: CNEY) has finalized a significant move. The company, also known as CNEY, stated that on January 25, 2026, it officially signed a framework agreement called the "Framework Agreement" with Blessing Logistics Ltd.'s shareholders. This strategic agreement marks a crucial development for CNEY's operations.

data.title: Key factors for Proof of Stake coins in 2026: finality speed, fees, staking risks, and ecosystem depth. Sei, ETH, SOL compared.
data.description: In the year 2026, an analysis of Proof of Stake (PoS) networks goes beyond mere speculation. It considers crucial metrics such as finality speed, fees, staking risks, and ecosystem breadth. Three notable networks, Sei, ETH, and SOL, are under scrutiny in comparison. Explore further for a detailed breakdown of their performances in these key areas.
